title: [ARCHIVED] End Reborn Additions
description: Adds new, additional content and gear to End Reborn, including many of the gear sets formerly part of Endgame Reborn.
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/TGbBb47Gr5) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459)

Addon mod for [End Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-reborn)

Adds several variants of Steel gear for use with End Reborn. These sets return from the original Endgame Reborn, and were cut from the main mod to ensure it reached its goal of staying true to vanilla.  All variants have the same defense/damage/speed so these new sets moreso provide playstyle choices and variety.

The Steel gear variants forged by crafting Remnant with other resources each have their unique differences. In order to discover the recipes, simply progress in the mod and begin to obtain its base resources and you will find that the smithing and crafting recipes reveal themselves to you.

Remnant Gear (for comparison purposes)

- sturdy and strong

- base variant forged from Remnant Ingots

- armour has knockback resistance

- fire resistant

- explosion resistant

- extended despawn timer

- repaired with Remnant Scrap or Ingots

Reinforced Steel Gear

- tough and reliable

- crafted with remnant ingots and diamonds

- tools have slightly higher durability

- armour has knockback resistance

- dropped items are immune to explosions

- repaired with diamonds

Gilded Steel Gear

- well-suited for fiery environments

- crafted using remnant scrap and gold ingots

- doesn’t burn in lava

- armour pacifies piglins

- has slightly higher durability

- repaired with netherite (scrap/ingot)

Forgotten Steel Gear

- durable and resistant

- crafted using remnant scrap and shulker shells

- armour has knockback resistance

- tools have slightly higher durability

- gear takes longer to despawn

- repaired with shulker shells

Fractured Steel Gear

- well-suited for enchanting, crafted and renewed using amethyst shards

- crafted using remnant scrap and amethyst shards

- has slightly higher durability

- has a much higher enchantability rating (25)

- repaired with amethyst shards

Sculk Steel Gear

- powerful, sturdy gear acquired using the rare resources of ancient cities

- crafted using remnant scrap and echo shards

- armour has much higher durability

- tools have a high chance to extract a small amount of XP from blocks and mobs when used

- repaired with echo shards

Lost Steel Gear

- forged and fueled with a mysterious power, this enhanced steel refuses to decay

- crafted using remnant scrap and experience bottles

- doesn't despawn when dropped

- has a slightly higher enchantability (20)

- repaired with experience bottles

Farmer's Delight Compatability

- built-in [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) support with knife variants for all aforementioned gear

### Host your own Server

If you're interested in playing Minecraft (with or without my mods) with your friends, I recommend you **[take a look at Kinetic Hosting!](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=55)**. I personally use their performance servers, and their specs, price, support and easy-to-use panel are the best of all the hosts I've been with. In addition, you can **[use code LEGACY for 15% off](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=55)** your first month!
